mapper.select: select b.id,book_name,cover,price,b.create_time,b.update_time,w.biography,us.first_name,us.last_name from books b join books_subcategories bsc on bsc.id_book=b.id join writers_books wb on wb.id_book=b.id join writer w on w.id_user=wb.id_writer join users us on us.id=w.id_user where bsc.id_subcategory=#{id};
